text.title: nginx Reverse Proxy Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply nginx Reverse Proxy end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-domains
step.action: Build a per-domain row (domain, backend, websocket?, ratelimit?).

step.name: compose-snippets
step.action: Wire proxy-params, security-headers, websocket, rate-limiting snippets.
step.decision-gate: If WebSocket requested, verify `$connection_upgrade` map is declared in http context.

step.name: deploy-and-reload
step.action: Install to /etc/nginx/, run `nginx -s reload`, smoke-test each domain.
